item.title: Hannah Einbinder wearing sunglasses and smoking a cigarette
item.description: Hannah Einbinder wearing sunglasses and smoking a cigarette

item.title: Mirror selfie of Dana sitting on her bed in a white boat neck top and a short baby blue skirt with white lacy trim, white socks, and black loafers. Blue text over top reads: 'Legs covered in unattributable bruises'
item.description: Mirror selfie of Dana sitting on her bed in a white boat neck top and a short baby blue skirt with white lacy trim, white socks, and black loafers. Blue text over top reads: 'Legs covered in unattributable bruises'

item.title: Dana's desk calendar, with an illustration of a Tamagotchi
item.description: Dana's desk calendar, with an illustration of a Tamagotchi

item.title: Laura Dern as Connie in 'Smooth Talk', lying on her back on the grass listening to the radio
item.description: Laura Dern as Connie in 'Smooth Talk', lying on her back on the grass listening to the radio

item.title: Elinor Dashwood with her head in her hands in 'Sense and Sensibility' (1995)
item.description: Elinor Dashwood with her head in her hands in 'Sense and Sensibility' (1995)

item.title: A blue sky with dappled white clouds and telecommunications wires in the foreground
item.description: A blue sky with dappled white clouds and telecommunications wires in the foreground

item.title: Dana's black and white cat, Snufkin, sitting at the top of the stairs
item.description: Dana's black and white cat, Snufkin, sitting at the top of the stairs

item.title: A blue sky, deep orange clouds, and wires and foliage in the foreground
item.description: A blue sky, deep orange clouds, and wires and foliage in the foreground

item.title: A video of Dana from behind standing outside of True History Brewery. She is wearing a pink skirt, black tube top, and her hair is up in a pink clip while she is smoking unaware she's being recorded. Inside the bar, the soccer game is playing.
item.description: A video of Dana from behind standing outside of True History Brewery. She is wearing a pink skirt, black tube top, and her hair is up in a pink clip while she is smoking unaware she's being recorded. Inside the bar, the soccer game is playing.

item.title: 'Our hands are coarse and full of words.—Bear with my telling you that God is not pretty.' - Clarice Lispector, The Passion According to G.H.
item.description: 'Our hands are coarse and full of words.—Bear with my telling you that God is not pretty.' - Clarice Lispector, The Passion According to G.H.
